actions.name: convert
actions.description: Convert a DocSend document URL to PDF and return JSON-safe download metadata.

url.description: The DocSend document URL to convert.

email.description: The optional email address required by some protected DocSend links.

passcode.description: The optional passcode required by password-protected DocSend links.

outputName.description: The preferred PDF filename for the converted document.

returnPdfBase64.description: Whether to return the PDF bytes as base64 when file transit is unavailable or not desired.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting one DocSend document to PDF.

contentType.description: The MIME type returned for the converted PDF.

limit.description: The maximum requests allowed in the rate-limit window.

remaining.description: The remaining requests in the current rate-limit window.

reset.description: The timestamp when the rate-limit window resets.

retryAfter.description: The retry delay in seconds when rate limited.

rateLimit.description: Rate limit metadata returned by Docsend2pdf when available.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the converted PDF.

base64.description: The converted PDF content encoded as base64 when explicitly requested.
